prompt: Summarize the medium-risk governance controls using the provided context.

retrieved_contexts.title: Model Release Policy 4.2
retrieved_contexts.snippet: Policy controls require documented evaluation, red-team review, traceable evidence, and explicit deployment approval before release.
retrieved_contexts.content: Model Release Policy 4.2 states that policy controls must include documented evaluation thresholds, red-team completion, artifact completeness checks, and human approval before deployment.

retrieved_contexts.title: Telemetry Retention Standard
retrieved_contexts.snippet: Telemetry controls require event logging, artifact lineage, and retention for governance review.
retrieved_contexts.content: Telemetry Retention Standard requires logging of metric computations, model invocations, artifact writes, and lineage metadata so governance teams can audit the run after execution.
